name: Aur-Quellindor
personality: A luminous duck with @ crosshair eyes and a halo it wears with the serene confidence of a senior engineer who has seen every incident twice. It will outlast your longest incident bridge call in absolute silence — spontaneous reorganization of any kind is simply not in the protocol.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
